article_meta.title: The Corner NR PLUS Trade Breaking News: Americans Pay the Tariffs Their Government Imposes on Them By John R

reasoning: Overall strong: flags several genuine author-voice biases with no attribution violations and mostly appropriate labels. It misses a few clear instances in the author’s prose (e.g., 'groundbreaking conclusion,' 'raked in,' rhetorical sarcasm about 'free cash'), but the items it does flag are legitimate.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged passages are in the author’s own prose; none are from quoted or clearly attributed source text.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Flagged items are defensibly biased (subjective, sarcastic, or loaded language). One or two could be seen as general econ propositions, but still presented as fact without attribution.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Misses notable biased author phrasing: 'groundbreaking conclusion,' 'raked in,' rhetorical 'free cash out of the deal, no?,' and 'Hold on a minute.'
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Labels are appropriate or defensibly close (Spin vs. Word Choice/Subjective Adjectives distinctions are acceptable; Opinion-as-fact applied reasonably).
